ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expressions" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detected expression */,
  "face_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the face being analyzed */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the detection */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the detection */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the detection was successful */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that captured the expression */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the expression was captured */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the expression was captured */,
  "camera_angle" TEXT /* Angle at which the face was captured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expressions_face_id FOREIGN KEY ("face_id") REFERENCES faces ("face_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faces" (
  "face_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each face */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file of the face */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the face */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender detected by the system */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range detected by the system */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity detected by the system */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("face_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faces_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion */,
  "emotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the emotion (e.g., happy, sad) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emotion */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity level of the emotion */,
  "emotional_state" TEXT /* Overall emotional state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expression analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted */,
  "analysis_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_logs_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES expressions ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotion_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expression linked to the emotion */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emotion identified */,
  "score" REAL /* Confidence score for the emotion link */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  "analysis_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_analysis_emotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("emotion_id") REFERENCES emotions ("emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotion_analysis_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES expressions ("expression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., webcam, smartphone) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the device was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expression analyzed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES expressions ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expression that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert generated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_action" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES expressions ("expression_id")
)
